summary:
Vitamin D deficiency impairs bone mineralization, which weakens subchondral bone and may increase susceptibility to joint damage such as osteochondritis dissecans. Although not directly studied, this biochemical link establishes a plausible pathological pathway connecting deficient vitamin D levels with the development of OCD through compromised skeletal strength.  

\boxed{A}

\boxed{A}. Answer choice: C
